text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 00:51 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

PLANNED / NOT IMPLEMENTED (EP-8 EARLY). Resolve only the consensus-committed manifest generation, then stream a referenced immutable artifact or reconstruct from referenced EC shards while validating checksum and length. The default replica read quorum is one valid replica; failed fallback records durable repair work and never selects or resurrects another generation.
using AWS CLI, SDK, curl, or
